gui.signin.title: Sign-in Center

gui.reward_items.subtitle: Multiple items supported, each can have independent NBT
gui.reward_items.error.count_positive: Count must be a positive integer.

gui.item_picker.hint: Tip: Click icon to select; clear means no item
message.signin.join.click_makeup_hover: Click to make up the latest missed day
message.signin.already_signed: You have already signed in today.
message.signin.makeup_out_of_range: The target day is out of make-up range.

message.signin.makeup_no_card: Make-up failed: not enough make-up cards.
message.signin.no_admin_permission: You do not have reward management permission.
message.signin.invalid_rewards: Invalid reward config: check XP, make-up cards, item ID, count and NBT data format.
message.signin.status.no_record: You have no sign-in record yet. Open GUI and start signing in.
message.signin.status.summary: Status: %s, streak %s day(s), total %s day(s), make-up cards %s, last sign-in %s.

message.signin.clear.self_no_data: You have no sign-in data to clear.
message.signin.clear.target_no_data: Player %s has no sign-in data to clear.
message.signin.clear.by_admin_success: Your sign-in data was cleared by an admin for testing.
message.signin.clear.by_admin_no_data: Admin executed clear, but you have no sign-in data.
